title: Sweet Ethiopian Cornmeal Crumble
description: A sweet and cozy Ethiopian dish featuring fine yellow cornmeal, deglazed with a touch of sweetness to create a chewy crumble suitable for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: 2 cups yellow cornmeal
ingredients.notes: Note: Cornmeal should be fine, not coarsely ground.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: For a sugar-free version, omit this ingredient.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons honey
ingredients.notes: Use for sweetness if you prefer to add it.

ingredients.name: 3 cups milk or non-dairy alternative
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is at room temperature to facilitate deglazing.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: For flavoring and aiding in browning.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped fresh herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as parsley or cilantro for added freshness.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine cornmeal, sugar, honey, salt, and optional herbs.
Pour in the milk and olive oil. Stir until well combined; make sure there are no lumps.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe baking dish or shallow pan to prevent overflow during cooking.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until edges start to brown slightly. Keep a close eye as it can easily burn in the oven.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving with your choice of sweet accompaniment like yogurt or fresh fruit.
